Home

About me

I am Yohsuke T. Fukai, a Ph. D. student in Sano laboratory, the University of Tokyo. My current interest is mainly focused on:
  • Universal fluctuation in out-of-equilibrium systems, especially interface fluctuation and the Kardar-Parisi-Zhang universality class.
  • Pattern formation in liquid crystal electroconvection
  • and so on.
Please check Profile and Research for details.
